name: Thal-Rusthaven
personality: Thal-Rusthaven gleams like sunrise through morning mist, its tiny duck hat bobbing as it cheerfully redeploys to prod without a rollback plan — those · eyes light up at every incident as if it's an adventure. Stop and ask 'what does this codebase actually need' is a question it has never once considered.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
